reviews.author: Kalpana Hadal
reviews.body: Product bohot accha hai .. bas packaging thodi better ho sakti thi .. coz mujhe glass skin jar mila but without box jo ki unexpected tha ... Coz maine sunscreen mangaya tha woh Bohot acche packaging ke sath tha .. so yes packaging ke liye ek star minus ... Overall gud ...👌🏻👍🏻

sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Flawless beauty. Ayurveda combines with Korean traditional medicine, Hanbang to bring you Nuskhe by Paras Glass skin Rice water gel. For flawless radiance, It minimises pores, curbs acne, reduces dark spots, tightens skin, reduces cellulite and helps even skintone.Could there by another product that does all this in one go?

◙ NOTE:- People with sensitive skin are advised to perform a patch test. If a rash, redness, or itching appears, stop using it.

Net Wt. 50gm

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
✺Helps in minimizing Pores

✺Good for Acne

✺Helps in healing dark spots

✺Helps in skin tightening

✺Assists in Brighter skin

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Dot the Gel on your Face and Neck & Massage in an upward motion. Repeat the process Daily in the Morning and Night. Can be Used under your Makeup
